{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103147D27AF6A74C3D1745D90E"}"},"total":11368},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6960957760721027876","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的太好看了，特别想看到女主和4个孩子一起出场的画面，一定爆笑，还有我希望男主快点醒过来，很想知道男主和女主之间是怎么相处的。总之这本书是一本神仙小说。我在番茄已经很久没有看到文笔这么流畅，剧情这么搞笑，而且还特别温馨感动的小说了。请作者大大快点更新吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1620724280,"group_id":"6960446645804731429","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5p7NUGiYI1ghMANTsqks6Q=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877005&x-signature=F7rwZ9C6HX8CXHTnqUkNbe1L%2B0Q%3D","user_id":"110811478429","user_name":"493598196"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110811478429","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1732876777,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6960446645804731429","book_info":{"abstract":"【萌宝+甜宠+爽文+穿书】
江瑾穿到一本小说中，成为四个反派大佬的恶毒亲妈，不是后妈，胜似后妈。
老大：我没有妈，我妈死了！
老二：莫挨老子，老子石头缝里蹦出来的！
老三：被淹死还是被撞死，自己选。
老四：最好死外面，我可以勉强帮你收尸。
为了挽救四个儿子，她走上了一条和四个王八羔子斗智斗勇的路。
厉云霆：不听话的儿子不要了，再生一个。
